'''Marsh Limoth''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Goroth Prime/Legends|Goroth Prime]] installed in [[17 BBY/Legends|17 BBY]].

He turned against [[Garlan Limoth|his father]] when he withdrew his support of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], and was rewarded for his loyalty by being assigned the "Personal Assistant" of the [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] of the [[Trans-Nebular sector/Legends|Trans-Nebular Sector]], [[Nebin Cray]]. Nebin, not wanting a Personal Assistant, proposed Marsh to be the Colonial Governor of Goroth when the old one expressed desire to resign, and Marsh was made so.
